modes.label: Fast Vocabulary
modes.description: High-density passages for rapid word exposure and frequent pop-up translation.

modes.label: Balanced Practice
modes.description: Mid-density articles balancing reading flow and vocabulary retention.

modes.label: Reading Habit
modes.description: Lower-density passages focused on sustained reading and natural context.

themes.label: Environment
themes.description: Climate systems, natural disasters, and sustainability.

themes.label: Earth Science
themes.description: Planetary structure, geography, and field observation.

themes.label: Education
themes.description: Academic thinking, campus life, and structured learning.

themes.label: Science & Tech
themes.description: Scientific discovery, chemistry, and modern innovation.

themes.label: Health
themes.description: Public health, nutrition, and modern medical systems.

themes.label: Society
themes.description: Citizenship, law, public policy, and social responsibility.

themes.label: Economy
themes.description: Markets, trade, industry, and business decisions.

themes.label: Culture
themes.description: Literature, media, art, and shared imagination.

themes.label: Food & Farming
themes.description: Agriculture, harvest cycles, and food systems.

articleCards.title: Fast Track: Climate Risk and Adaptation
articleCards.summary: Rapidly acquire core environment vocabulary through a dense, high-support passage.

articleCards.title: Fast Track: Nutrition, Disease, and Prevention
articleCards.summary: Build a dense first-pass vocabulary set for health, nutrition, and public care.

articleCards.title: Balanced Practice: Learning How to Think on Campus
articleCards.summary: Balance vocabulary learning with a natural academic passage about university study.

articleCards.title: Balanced Practice: From Theory to Innovation
articleCards.summary: Use a medium-density article to connect scientific vocabulary with practical technology.

articleCards.title: Reading Habit: Living with Climate Uncertainty
articleCards.summary: Train sustained reading while encountering a modest number of environment words in context.

articleCards.title: Reading Habit: Why University Culture Matters
articleCards.summary: Develop reading stamina with a more natural education passage and lighter vocabulary load.

articleCards.title: Fast Track: Reading the Shape of the Earth
articleCards.summary: Rapidly build high-frequency earth-science vocabulary through a dense IELTS-style overview.

articleCards.title: Balanced Practice: How Landscapes Keep Their Memory
articleCards.summary: Practise a balanced earth-science passage with a moderate target-word load.

articleCards.title: Reading Habit: A Coastline at Low Tide
articleCards.summary: Build reading stamina through a lower-density geography passage.

articleCards.title: Fast Track: The Citizen, Law, and Public Trust
articleCards.summary: Rapidly cover civic and government vocabulary in a policy-focused passage.

articleCards.title: Balanced Practice: The Language of Public Responsibility
articleCards.summary: Balance civic vocabulary with a natural argument about public responsibility.

articleCards.title: Reading Habit: A Small Meeting in a Large Society
articleCards.summary: Sustain reading with a lighter civic passage about trust and participation.

articleCards.title: Balanced Practice: Why Market Confidence Matters
articleCards.summary: Practise medium-density business vocabulary in a readable academic argument.

articleCards.title: Reading Habit: Stories in a Multimedia Age
articleCards.summary: Sustain reading with a natural culture-and-media passage and light vocabulary load.

articleCards.title: Balanced Practice: From Seed to City Table
articleCards.summary: Practise agriculture vocabulary through a balanced passage about food systems.
